title: U.S. races to find missing airman as Iranian TV broadcasts reward for capture
summary_full: Iranian state media said “many people” are searching for the missing crew member after an F-15 fighter jet and an A-10 attack plane were lost to hostile fire.
summary_public: Iranian state media said “many people” are searching for the missing crew member after an F-15 fighter jet and an A-10 attack plane were lost to hostile fire.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: Iranian TV broadcasts reward for capture
